feedback.text: After all these years seeing the gaming community to defend their rights and request for what was the standard before gives me hope. But I would like to add a little story we got in Türkiye. Once upon a time, a herd of oxen lived together peacefully in a large field. Among them was a yellow ox that stood out because of its color. One day, a wolf came and asked the oxen to give him the yellow ox, promising not to harm the rest. After some hesitation, the oxen agreed and gave up the yellow ox to protect themselves. But after that, the wolf kept coming back, asking for more oxen one by one. Since they had already given up the yellow ox, they had lost their unity and couldnt resist. In the end, the wolf ate them all. As the gaming community we already gave many oxen and for that the sorrow I possess will never pass by. Today we are perhaps trying not to lose the last ox of the field (which is the product we paid for) to the so called wolf. We will try to hold on to it so it doesn't slip away from our hands forever.
